decision: Ship the deterministic evidence-complete stack; keep every optional planner, reranker, and critic model disabled by default.

stages.decision: Rust investigation contracts and the locked path/shortcut suite are authoritative.
Mandatory fielded lexical retrieval plus Granite Embedding 97M R2 INT8 CPU query embeddings.
No reranker by default; Ettin 32M INT8 is the measured bounded escalation but adds no path completion.
Deterministic Rust rules; no planner model by default.
Disabled; neither Bonsai operating point passes the locked gate.
Use deterministic verifier-backed CodeGraphRAG relationships and immutable tagged-history occurrence/change evidence.
The frontier answerer is reachable only after complete facet and relationship coverage; incomplete evidence returns insufficiency.

apple_m1_lookup.coreml: rejected for this exact model/runtime after CPU fallback and execution-plan failure

rx_5700_xt_assisted.ingestion: Jina v2 base code FP16 MIGraphX at 512 tokens, batch 8, lossless mean pooling
rx_5700_xt_assisted.planner: deterministic Rust; Vulkan models measured but disabled
rx_5700_xt_assisted.scope: Ryzen 5 8600G + RX 5700 XT gfx1010 with pinned runtime/model artifacts

release_gates.licenses: Selected and measured model artifacts record Apache-2.0 compatibility.
release_gates.upgrade_policy: Model, quantization, runtime, provider, hardware, prompt, or budget changes require an explicit bounded rebenchmark.
